description: Maps a Wave paymentType (card, cash, mobile, ...) to a classification (prepaid|cod) and an ERP Mode of Payment.

fields.description: Wave paymentType string as emitted in ORDER.CREATE payloads (card, cash, klarna, mobile, bankTransfer, thirdPartyReference, cardOnDelivery, irisOnDelivery).
fields.label: Wave Payment Type

fields.description: Whether this Wave paymentType represents an already-collected (prepaid) payment or one collected at delivery (cod).
fields.label: Classification

fields.description: ERP Mode of Payment to expect on Payment Entries that settle Wave orders with this paymentType. Optional: rows seeded blank so operators link site-specific MOPs (MPESA, Cash, Bank Transfer, ...). The validator's MOP-mismatch check is a Warning, not a hard block.
fields.label: Mode of Payment

fields.description: Optional human-readable note shown in the mapping grid.
fields.label: Description

name: Wave Payment Method Mapping
